title: tephrosia capitata
intro: Tephrosia capitata, also known as Bird's Tongue or Silver Leaf, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and snake bites. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are believed to be responsible for its health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Tephrosia capitata is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and has also been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
